code: import{useState,useEffect}from"react";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function OnboardingPage(_ref){let{onNext}=_ref;const[examsData,setExamsData]=useState([]);const[selectedExam,setSelectedExam]=useState(null);const[selectedSubjects,setSelectedSubjects]=useState([]);const[selectedTopics,setSelectedTopics]=useState({});const[currentStep,setCurrentStep]=useState("examSelection");const[hours,setHours]=useState(4);const[targetDate,setTargetDate]=useState("");const[isGenerating,setIsGenerating]=useState(false);useEffect(()=>{fetch("http://localhost:5001/api/exams").then(res=>res.json()).then(setExamsData);},[]);const handleGenerateSchedule=async()=>{setIsGenerating(true);const response=await fetch("http://localhost:5001/api/generate-schedule",{method:"POST",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"},body:JSON.stringify({exam:selectedExam.name,subjects:selectedSubjects,topics:selectedTopics,hours,deadline:targetDate})});const data=await response.json();onNext(data);setIsGenerating(false);};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Plan Olu\u015Ftur"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:handleGenerateSchedule,children:"Plan \xDCret"})]});}export default OnboardingPage;
